name: conventional-commit-ai
description: AI-powered Conventional Commits generator — supports Anthropic, OpenAI, Groq, Ollama, and rule-based analysis

commands.title: Git Commit Wizard: Configure AI Provider

enumDescriptions: OpenAI GPT (requires API key, also works with compatible APIs)
Groq — fast inference, free tier available
Rule-based — no API key needed, works offline
commitWizard.aiProvider.markdownDescription: AI provider for commit message generation. Set to `rule-based` for offline use.

commitWizard.anthropicApiKey.markdownDescription: Anthropic API key. Get one at [console.anthropic.com](https://console.anthropic.com/).

commitWizard.anthropicModel.description: Anthropic model to use. Haiku is fastest and cheapest.

commitWizard.openaiApiKey.markdownDescription: OpenAI API key. Also works with OpenAI-compatible APIs (Azure, Together AI, etc.).

commitWizard.openaiModel.description: OpenAI model to use. gpt-4o-mini is fast and cost-effective.

commitWizard.openaiBaseUrl.description: OpenAI API base URL. Change for compatible APIs (Azure, Together AI, local servers).

commitWizard.groqApiKey.markdownDescription: Groq API key. Get one free at [console.groq.com](https://console.groq.com/).

commitWizard.groqModel.description: Groq model to use. llama-3.1-8b-instant is the fastest.

commitWizard.ollamaUrl.description: Ollama server URL for local AI generation.

commitWizard.ollamaModel.description: Ollama model name. Run `ollama pull <model>` first.

commitWizard.suggestionCount.description: Number of commit message suggestions to generate (AI providers only).

commitWizard.language.description: Language for generated commit messages (e.g. Korean, Japanese, English).

commitWizard.useEmoji.markdownDescription: Add [gitmoji](https://gitmoji.dev/) emoji to commit messages (e.g. `✨ feat: ...`).

commitWizard.maxSubjectLength.description: Maximum character length for the commit subject line.

commitWizard.customPrompt.markdownDescription: Additional instructions appended to the AI prompt. Example: `Always mention the ticket number in the scope.`
